ec2.ec2fleet.acceleratorcountrequest.Cfn: The minimum and maximum number of accelerators (GPUs, FPGAs, or AWS Inferentia chips) on an instance. To exclude accelerator-enabled instance types, set `Max` to `0`.

ec2.ec2fleet.acceleratorcountrequest.Max.Description: The maximum number of accelerators. To specify no maximum limit, omit this parameter. To exclude accelerator-enabled instance types, set `Max` to `0`.

ec2.ec2fleet.acceleratorcountrequest.Min.Description: The minimum number of accelerators. To specify no minimum limit, omit this parameter.
